_comment: Sealing artifact for Phase 4.1's 20% held-out partition of calibration claims. Version 2 requires external grounding breakdown for every claim in the partition (Curie A2 independence requirement). Fill fields below ONCE before any annotation work begins; never modify after sealing. Verify with packages/benchmark/calibration/heldout-seals.ts::verifyReliabilityHeldoutSeal. See docs/PHASE_4_PLAN.md §4.1.

_fields.seed: string — pre-registered RNG seed committed before data collection
_fields.partition_size: integer — count of claim_ids in the held-out set
_fields.sealed_at: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which the partition was sealed
_fields.external_grounding_breakdown: object — claim count per ExternalGroundingType {schema, math, code, spec}; sum must equal partition_size
_fields.external_grounding_total: integer — sum of external_grounding_breakdown values; must equal partition_size
_fields.claim_set_hash: string — sha256 hex digest over sorted-newline-joined claim_ids
